name: Moonlight
description_short: Moonlight Federal Credit Union offers checking, savings, loans, and credit cards to members. A traditional credit union with competitive rates and digital banking features.
description_long:
Moonlight Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative operating as a traditional credit union. Based on their website, they serve individuals seeking an alternative to commercial banks with a focus on member relationships and personalized service. Their mission emphasizes exceeding member expectations through lifelong trusting relationships built one member at a time.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts (checking, savings, Christmas Club, CDs), consumer loans (signature loans, auto loans, mortgages, home equity, student loans), and credit products (Visa credit cards and Mastercard debit cards). They provide online and mobile banking platforms, loan calculators, free credit reports, and are implementing enhanced debit card features including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, and Google Pay integration by May 2026, along with on-site card printing for fraud replacement.

Moonlight FCU distinguishes itself through competitive rate-matching on auto loans, a fixed 9.9% APR Visa credit card with no annual fees and contactless payment capability, and member-friendly amenities like on-site ticket sales for local entertainment venues (Kennywood, Idlewild, Sandcastle). The credit union maintains transparent communication through announcements, newsletters, and member awareness initiatives.

As a credit union, Moonlight benefits from the cooperative model and member-centric approach typical of the sector. However, membership eligibility, field of membership restrictions, and branch location limitations (typical for credit unions) may apply. The website lacks specific information about membership requirements, geographic service areas, and detailed fee structures, which are important considerations for prospective members.
pros: Competitive auto loan rates with rate-matching guarantee
Visa credit card at fixed 9.9% APR with no annual fees
Upcoming digital wallet integration (Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, Google Pay)
Free credit reports available to members
On-site debit card printing for fraud replacement
Member-focused mission with personalized service approach
cons: Website does not disclose membership eligibility criteria or field of membership restrictions
No information about branch locations or service area geographic limits
Fee schedule and account maintenance costs not detailed on website
Limited transparency about loan approval processes and qualification requirements
No mention of customer service hours or support availability
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto loan rates with rate-matching guarantees
Credit union members wanting no-fee Visa credit cards with digital wallet compatibility
Individuals preferring member-owned financial institutions over commercial banks
Consumers valuing personalized service and local community connection
diagnosis: Moonlight Federal Credit Union is best for individuals eligible for membership seeking a traditional credit union alternative to commercial banks, particularly those interested in competitive auto loan rates and no-fee credit cards. The main caveat is that the website lacks critical information about membership eligibility, service area coverage, and complete fee disclosures—prospective members must contact the credit union directly to confirm they qualify and understand the full terms.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Moonlight — Credit Union in Worthington, PA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Moonlight — NCUA-insured credit union in Worthington, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
